subject: SOC 2 Type II Compliance Update
body:
Security and Finance Teams,

Our SOC 2 Type II audit is progressing. Status update:

Completed:
- Access control policies documented and tested
- Change management procedures verified
- Incident response plan tested via tabletop exercise
- Vendor risk assessments for all critical vendors

In Progress:
- Business continuity testing (scheduled March 25th)
- Penetration test by external firm (report expected April 5th)
- Employee security awareness training completion (currently 87%, need 100%)

Budget Status:
- Allocated: $280K
- Spent to date: $195K
- Remaining commitments: $70K
- Expected to come in $15K under budget

The auditors will be on-site April 14-18 for final testing. Please ensure all evidence packages are uploaded to the compliance portal by April 10th.

This certification is critical for our enterprise sales pipeline - 4 deals totaling $2.1M are contingent on SOC 2 completion.
